/home/runner/work/UsrLinuxEmu/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_compat_memory_standalone.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_compat_memory_standalone.dir/test_compat_memory.cpp.o -o ../bin/test_compat_memory_standalone  ../src/libkernel.a -ldl -lpthread
